* `creator` which defines the name of the creator of the document, such as an organization or institution. If there are more than one, several [`<meta>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/meta "The HTML <meta> element represents metadata that cannot be represented by other HTML meta-related elements, like <base>, <link>, <script>, <style> or <title>.") elements should be used. * `googlebot`, a synonym of `robots`, is only followed by Googlebot (the indexing crawler for Google). * `publisher` which defines the name of the document's publisher. * `robots` which defines the behaviour that cooperative crawlers, or "robots", should use with the page. It is a comma-separated list of the values below:

In web browser terms, it refers to the part of the document you're viewing which is currently visible in its window (or the screen, if the document is being viewed in full screen mode). Content outside the viewport is not visible onscreen until scrolled into view."). Used by mobile devices only.
Values for the content of `<meta name="viewport">`
Value
Possible subvalues
Description
`width`
A positive integer number, or the text `device-width`
Defines the pixel width of the viewport that you want the web site to be rendered at.
`height`
A positive integer, or the text `device-height`
Defines the height of the viewport. Not used by any browser.
`initial-scale`
A positive number between `0.0` and `10.0`
Defines the ratio between the device width (`device-width` in portrait mode or `device-height` in landscape mode) and the viewport size.
`maximum-scale`
A positive number between `0.0` and `10.0`
Defines the maximum amount to zoom in. It must be greater or equal to the `minimum-scale` or the behaviour is undefined. Browser settings can ignore this rule and iOS10+ ignores it by default.
`minimum-scale`
A positive number between `0.0` and `10.0`
Defines the minimum zoom level. It must be smaller or equal to the `maximum-scale` or the behaviour is undefined. Browser settings can ignore this rule and iOS10+ ignores it by default.
`user-scalable`
`yes` or `no`
If set to `no`, the user is not able to zoom in the webpage. The default is `yes`. Browser settings can ignore this rule, and iOS10+ ignores it by default.
Specification
Status
Comment
[CSS Device Adaptation The definition of '<meta name="viewport">' in that specification.](https://drafts.csswg.org/css-device-adapt/#viewport-meta)
Working Draft
Non-normatively describes the Viewport META element
See also: [`@viewport`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/@viewport "The @viewport CSS at-rule lets you configure the viewport through which the document is viewed. It's primarily used for mobile devices, but is also used by desktop browsers that support features like "snap to edge" (such as Microsoft Edge).")
**Notes:**
* Though unstandardized, this declaration is respected by most mobile browsers due to de-facto dominance. * The default values may vary between devices and browsers. * To learn about this declaration in Firefox for Mobile, see [this article](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Mobile/Viewport_meta_tag "Mobile/Viewport meta tag").

trans-unit.source: This Boolean attribute is set to indicate that the script should not be executed in browsers that support [ES2015 modules](https://hacks.mozilla.org/2015/08/es6-in-depth-modules/) — in effect, this can be used to serve fallback scripts to older browsers that do not support modular JavaScript code.
trans-unit.target: 此布尔特性设置为指示不应在支持 [ES2015 模块](https://hacks.mozilla.org/2015/08/es6-in-depth-modules/)的浏览器中执行脚本，实际上，这可用于向不支持模块化 JavaScript 代码的旧版浏览器提供回退脚本。

trans-unit.source: A cryptographic nonce (number used once) used to allow inline styles in a [style-src Content-Security-Policy](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Security-Policy/style-src). The server must generate a unique nonce value each time it transmits a policy. It is critical to provide a nonce that cannot be guessed as bypassing a resource’s policy is otherwise trivial.
trans-unit.target: 用于在 [style-src Content-Security-Policy](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Content-Security-Policy/style-src)中允许内联样式的加密 nonce (使用一次的数字)。服务器每次传输策略时都必须生成唯一的 nonce 值。提供无法被猜到的 nonce 至关重要，因为绕过资源的策略在其他方面不太重要。

trans-unit.source: This Boolean attribute indicates that the form is not to be validated when submitted. If this attribute is not specified (and therefore the form is validated), this default setting can be overridden by a [`formnovalidate`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-formnovalidate) attribute on a [`<button>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button "The HTML <button> element represents a clickable button, which can be used in forms or anywhere in a document that needs simple, standard button functionality.") or [`<input>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input "The HTML <input> element is used to create interactive controls for web-based forms in order to accept data from the user; a wide variety of types of input data and control widgets are available, depending on the device and user agent.") element belonging to the form.
trans-unit.target: 此布尔特性指示提交时不会验证窗体。如果未指定此特性(因此窗体已验证)，则此默认设置可能会被属于窗体的 [`<button>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button "HTML <button> 元素表示一个可点击的按钮，可以在窗体或文档中任何需要简单、标准按钮功能的地方使用。")或 [`<input>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input "HTML <input> 元素用于为基于 Web 的窗体创建交互式控件，以便接受来自用户的数据；可使用各种类型的输入数据和控件小组件，具体取决于设备和用户代理。")元素上的 [`formnovalidate`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/button#attr-formnovalidate)特性替代。

trans-unit.source: The loading of a resource has been aborted.
trans-unit.target: 资源加载已中止。

trans-unit.source: Function to call after the user has printed the document.
trans-unit.target: 在用户打印文档后调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the user requests printing of the document.
trans-unit.target: 当用户请求打印文档时调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the document is about to be unloaded.
trans-unit.target: 文档即将卸载时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: An element has lost focus (does not bubble).
trans-unit.target: 元素失去焦点(不显示气泡)。

trans-unit.source: The user agent can play the media, but estimates that not enough data has been loaded to play the media up to its end without having to stop for further buffering of content.
trans-unit.target: 用户代理可以播放媒体，但估计尚未加载足够的数据，无法在不进一步缓冲内容的情况下完整播放媒体。

trans-unit.source: The user agent can play the media up to its end without having to stop for further buffering of content.
trans-unit.target: 用户代理可以完整播放媒体，而无需停下来进一步缓冲内容。

trans-unit.source: The change event is fired for <input>, <select>, and <textarea> elements when a change to the element's value is committed by the user.
trans-unit.target: 当用户提交对元素值的更改时，将为 <input>、<select> 和 <textarea> 元素触发更改事件。

trans-unit.source: A pointing device button has been pressed and released on an element.
trans-unit.target: 已在元素上按下并释放指针设备按钮。

trans-unit.source: The right button of the mouse is clicked (before the context menu is displayed).
trans-unit.target: 单击鼠标的右键(在显示上下文菜单之前)。

trans-unit.source: A pointing device button is clicked twice on an element.
trans-unit.target: 在元素上单击一个指针设备按钮两次。

trans-unit.source: An element or text selection is being dragged (every 350ms).
trans-unit.target: 正在拖动元素或文本选择(每 350 秒)。

trans-unit.source: A drag operation is being ended (by releasing a mouse button or hitting the escape key).
trans-unit.target: 拖动操作即将结束(通过释放鼠标按钮或按下 Esc 键)。

trans-unit.source: A dragged element or text selection enters a valid drop target.
trans-unit.target: 拖动元素或文本选择会进入有效的拖放目标。

trans-unit.source: A dragged element or text selection leaves a valid drop target.
trans-unit.target: 拖动的元素或文本选择会离开有效的拖放目标。

trans-unit.source: An element or text selection is being dragged over a valid drop target (every 350ms).
trans-unit.target: 正在将元素或文本选择拖动到有效的拖放目标(每 350 秒)上。

trans-unit.source: The user starts dragging an element or text selection.
trans-unit.target: 用户开始拖动元素或文本选择。

trans-unit.source: An element is dropped on a valid drop target.
trans-unit.target: 在有效的拖放目标上放置元素。

trans-unit.source: The duration attribute has been updated.
trans-unit.target: duration 特性已更新。

trans-unit.source: The media has become empty; for example, this event is sent if the media has already been loaded (or partially loaded), and the load() method is called to reload it.
trans-unit.target: 媒体变为空；例如，如果媒体已加载(或部分加载)，并且调用 load() 方法来重新加载媒体，则发送此事件。

trans-unit.source: Playback has stopped because the end of the media was reached.
trans-unit.target: 由于已到达媒体末尾，播放已停止。

trans-unit.source: A resource failed to load.
trans-unit.target: 无法加载资源。

trans-unit.source: An element has received focus (does not bubble).
trans-unit.target: 元素获得焦点(不显示气泡)。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the fragment identifier part (starting with the hash (`'#'`) character) of the document's current address has changed.
trans-unit.target: 文档当前地址的片段标识符部分(以哈希(`'#'`)字符开头)发生更改时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: The value of an element changes or the content of an element with the attribute contenteditable is modified.
trans-unit.target: 元素的值发生变化，或者具有 contenteditable 特性的元素的内容被修改。

trans-unit.source: A submittable element has been checked and doesn't satisfy its constraints.
trans-unit.target: 已检查可提交元素，但不满足其约束。

trans-unit.source: A key is pressed down.
trans-unit.target: 按下一个键。

trans-unit.source: A key is pressed down and that key normally produces a character value (use input instead).
trans-unit.target: 按下某个键，该键通常会产生一个字符值(改为使用输入)。

trans-unit.source: A key is released.
trans-unit.target: 将释放键。

trans-unit.source: A resource and its dependent resources have finished loading.
trans-unit.target: 资源及其依赖资源已完成加载。

trans-unit.source: The first frame of the media has finished loading.
trans-unit.target: 媒体的第一帧已完成加载。

trans-unit.source: The metadata has been loaded.
trans-unit.target: 已加载元数据。

trans-unit.source: Progress has begun.
trans-unit.target: 进度已开始。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the document has received a message.
trans-unit.target: 当文档收到消息时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: A pointing device button (usually a mouse) is pressed on an element.
trans-unit.target: 在元素上按下指针设备按钮(通常是鼠标)。

trans-unit.source: A pointing device is moved over an element.
trans-unit.target: 指针设备将移到元素上方。

trans-unit.source: A pointing device is moved off the element that has the listener attached or off one of its children.
trans-unit.target: 指针设备从附加了侦听器的元素或其子级之一移出。

trans-unit.source: A pointing device is moved onto the element that has the listener attached or onto one of its children.
trans-unit.target: 将指针设备移到附加了侦听器的元素上或移动到其子级之一上。

trans-unit.source: A pointing device button is released over an element.
trans-unit.target: 指针设备按钮在元素上释放。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when network communication has failed.
trans-unit.target: 网络通信失败时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when network communication has been restored.
trans-unit.target: 还原网络通信时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: Playback has been paused.
trans-unit.target: 播放已暂停。

trans-unit.source: Playback has begun.
trans-unit.target: 播放已开始。

trans-unit.source: Playback is ready to start after having been paused or delayed due to lack of data.
trans-unit.target: 由于缺少数据而暂停或延迟播放后，已准备好开始播放。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the user has navigated session history.
trans-unit.target: 在用户导航会话历史记录时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: In progress.
trans-unit.target: 正在进行。

trans-unit.source: The playback rate has changed.
trans-unit.target: 播放速率已更改。

trans-unit.source: The readyState attribute of a document has changed.
trans-unit.target: 文档的 readyState 特性已更改。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the user has moved forward in undo transaction history.
trans-unit.target: 当用户在撤消事务历史记录中向前移动时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: A form is reset.
trans-unit.target: 将重置窗体。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the document has been resized.
trans-unit.target: 文档大小调整后要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: The document view or an element has been scrolled.
trans-unit.target: 文档视图或元素已滚动。

trans-unit.source: A seek operation completed.
trans-unit.target: 已完成搜寻操作。

trans-unit.source: A seek operation began.
trans-unit.target: 已开始搜寻操作。

trans-unit.source: Some text is being selected.
trans-unit.target: 正在选择某些文本。

trans-unit.source: A contextmenu event was fired on/bubbled to an element that has a contextmenu attribute
trans-unit.target: 上下文菜单事件在具有 contextmenu 特性的元素上触发/显示气泡

trans-unit.source: The user agent is trying to fetch media data, but data is unexpectedly not forthcoming.
trans-unit.target: 用户代理正在尝试提取媒体数据，但数据意外地未提供。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the storage area has changed.
trans-unit.target: 在存储区域更改时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: A form is submitted.
trans-unit.target: 将提交窗体。

trans-unit.source: Media data loading has been suspended.
trans-unit.target: 媒体数据加载已暂停。

trans-unit.source: The time indicated by the currentTime attribute has been updated.
trans-unit.target: currentTime 特性指示的时间已更新。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the user has moved backward in undo transaction history.
trans-unit.target: 当用户在撤消事务历史记录中向后移动时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: Function to call when the document is going away.
trans-unit.target: 文档离开时要调用的函数。

trans-unit.source: The volume has changed.
trans-unit.target: 卷已更改。

trans-unit.source: Playback has stopped because of a temporary lack of data.
trans-unit.target: 由于暂时缺少数据，播放已停止。

trans-unit.source: Indicates that the dialog is active and available for interaction. When the `open` attribute is not set, the dialog shouldn't be shown to the user.
trans-unit.target: 指示对话处于活动状态并可用于交互。如果未设置 `open` 特性，则不应向用户显示对话。

trans-unit.source: This attribute indicates the optimal numeric value. It must be within the range (as defined by the `min` attribute and `max` attribute). When used with the `low` attribute and `high` attribute, it gives an indication where along the range is considered preferable. For example, if it is between the `min` attribute and the `low` attribute, then the lower range is considered preferred.
trans-unit.target: 此特性指示最佳数值。它必须在范围内(由 `min` 特性和 `max` 特性定义)。与 `low` 特性和 `high` 特性一起使用时，它会指示优先考虑范围内的哪个位置。例如，如果介于 `min` 特性和 `low` 特性之间，则优先考虑较低的范围。

trans-unit.source: A space-separated list of the part names of the element. Part names allows CSS to select and style specific elements in a shadow tree via the [`::part`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/CSS/::part "The ::part CSS pseudo-element represents any element within a shadow tree that has a matching part attribute.") pseudo-element.
trans-unit.target: 元素各部分名称的空格分隔列表。部件名称允许 CSS 通过 [`::part`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/CSS/::part "::part CSS 伪元素表示影子树中具有匹配 part 特性的任何元素。")伪元素选择影子树中的特定元素和设置其样式。

trans-unit.source: Contains a space-separated list of URLs to which, when the hyperlink is followed, [`POST`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods/POST "The HTTP POST method sends data to the server. The type of the body of the request is indicated by the Content-Type header.") requests with the body `PING` will be sent by the browser (in the background). Typically used for tracking.
trans-unit.target: 包含一个以空格分隔的 URL 列表，当点击超链接时，浏览器(在后台)将发送正文为 `PING` 的 [`POST`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods/POST "HTTP POST 方法将数据发送到服务器。请求正文的类型由 Content-Type 标头指示。")请求。通常用于跟踪。

trans-unit.source:
A hint to the user of what can be entered in the control. Carriage returns or line-feeds within the placeholder text must be treated as line breaks when rendering the hint.
**Note:** Placeholders should only be used to show an example of the type of data that should be entered into a form; they are _not_ a substitute for a proper [`<label>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/label "The HTML <label> element represents a caption for an item in a user interface.") element tied to the input. See [Labels and placeholders](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input#Labels_and_placeholders "The HTML <input> element is used to create interactive controls for web-based forms in order to accept data from the user; a wide variety of types of input data and control widgets are available, depending on the device and user agent.") in [<input>: The Input (Form Input) element](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input "The HTML <input> element is used to create interactive controls for web-based forms in order to accept data from the user; a wide variety of types of input data and control widgets are available, depending on the device and user agent.") for a full explanation.
trans-unit.target:
向用户提示可在控件中输入的内容。在呈现此提示时，占位符文本中的回车符或换行符必须被视为换行符。
**注意:** 占位符只能用于显示应输入到表单中的数据类型示例；它们不能替代与输入关联的正确 [`<label>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/label "HTML <label> 元素表示用户界面中某个项目的标题。")元素。请参阅 [<input>: Input (表单输入)元素](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input "HTML <input> 元素用于为基于 Web 的表单创建交互式控件；以便接收来自用户的数据；可用的输入数据和控件小组件类型很多，具体取决于设备和用户代理。")中的[标签和占位符](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input#Labels_and_placeholders "HTML <input> 元素用于为基于 Web 的表单创建交互式控件；以便接收来自用户的数据；可用的输入数据和控件小组件类型很多，具体取决于设备和用户代理。")，获取完整说明。

trans-unit.source: Designates an element as a popover element.
trans-unit.target: 将元素指定为弹出框元素。

trans-unit.source: The URIs of one or more metadata profiles, separated by white space.
trans-unit.target: 一个或多个元数据配置文件的 URI，用空格分隔。

trans-unit.source: This Boolean attribute indicates that the user cannot modify the value of the control. Unlike the `disabled` attribute, the `readonly` attribute does not prevent the user from clicking or selecting in the control. The value of a read-only control is still submitted with the form.
trans-unit.target: 此布尔特性指示用户无法修改控件的值。与 `disabled` 特性不同，`readonly` 特性不会阻止用户点击或选择控件。只读控件的值仍随窗体一起提交。

trans-unit.source:
A string indicating which referrer to use when fetching the resource:
* `no-referrer` means that the [`Referer`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Referer "The Referer request header contains the address of the previous web page from which a link to the currently requested page was followed. The Referer header allows servers to identify where people are visiting them from and may use that data for analytics, logging, or optimized caching, for example.") header will not be sent. * `no-referrer-when-downgrade` means that no [`Referer`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Referer "The Referer request header contains the address of the previous web page from which a link to the currently requested page was followed. The Referer header allows servers to identify where people are visiting them from and may use that data for analytics, logging, or optimized caching, for example.") header will be sent when navigating to an origin without TLS (HTTPS). This is a user agent’s default behavior, if no policy is otherwise specified. * `origin` means that the referrer will be the origin of the page, which is roughly the scheme, the host, and the port. * `origin-when-cross-origin` means that navigating to other origins will be limited to the scheme, the host, and the port, while navigating on the same origin will include the referrer's path. * `unsafe-url` means that the referrer will include the origin and the path (but not the fragment, password, or username). This case is unsafe because it can leak origins and paths from TLS-protected resources to insecure origins.
trans-unit.target:
指示在提取资源时要使用哪个引用来源的字符串:
* `no-referrer` 表示不会发送 [`Referer`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Referer "Referer 请求标头包含上一个网页的地址，用户通过该网页上的链接访问到当前请求的页面。Referer 标头允许服务器用户正在从哪里访问它们，并可将该数据用于分析、日志记录或优化缓存等用途。")标头。 * `no-referrer-when-downgrade` 表示在导航到不使用 TLS (HTTPS)的源时，不会发送 [`Referer`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Referer "Referer 请求标头包含上一个网页的地址，用户通过该网页上的链接访问到当前请求的页面。Referer 标头允许服务器用户正在从哪里访问它们，并可将该数据用于分析、日志记录或优化缓存等用途。")标头。如果未指定其他策略，这是用户代理的默认行为。 * `origin` 表示引用来源将是页面的源，大致包括方案、主机和端口。 * `origin-when-cross-origin` 表示在导航到其他源时，仅使用方案、主机和端口；而在同一源内导航时，则会包含引用来源的路径。 * `unsafe-url` 表示引用来源将包含源和路径，但不包括片段、密码或用户名。此情况不安全，因为它可能会将受 TLS 保护的资源的源和路径泄露到不安全的源。

trans-unit.source: This attribute names a relationship of the linked document to the current document. The attribute must be a space-separated list of the [link types values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Link_types).
trans-unit.target: 此特性指定链接的文档与当前文档的关系。该特性必须是 [链接类型值](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Link_types)的空格分隔列表。

trans-unit.source: A Boolean attribute indicating that an option with a non-empty string value must be selected.
trans-unit.target: 一个布尔特性，指示必须选择具有非空字符串值的选项。

trans-unit.source: This Boolean attribute specifies that the items of the list are specified in reversed order.
trans-unit.target: 此布尔特性指定按反向顺序指定列表的项。

trans-unit.source: The number of visible text lines for the control.
trans-unit.target: 控件的可见文本行数。

trans-unit.source:
Applies extra restrictions to the content in the frame. The value of the attribute can either be empty to apply all restrictions, or space-separated tokens to lift particular restrictions:
* `allow-forms`: Allows the resource to submit forms. If this keyword is not used, form submission is blocked. * `allow-modals`: Lets the resource [open modal windows](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/origin.html#sandboxed-modals-flag). * `allow-orientation-lock`: Lets the resource [lock the screen orientation](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Screen/lockOrientation). * `allow-pointer-lock`: Lets the resource use the [Pointer Lock API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/WebAPI/Pointer_Lock). * `allow-popups`: Allows popups (such as `window.open()`, `target="_blank"`, or `showModalDialog()`). If this keyword is not used, the popup will silently fail to open. * `allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox`: Lets the sandboxed document open new windows without those windows inheriting the sandboxing. For example, this can safely sandbox an advertisement without forcing the same restrictions upon the page the ad links to. * `allow-presentation`: Lets the resource start a [presentation session](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/PresentationRequest). * `allow-same-origin`: If this token is not used, the resource is treated as being from a special origin that always fails the [same-origin policy](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/same-origin_policy "same-origin policy: The same-origin policy is a critical security mechanism that restricts how a document or script loaded from one origin can interact with a resource from another origin."). * `allow-scripts`: Lets the resource run scripts (but not create popup windows). * `allow-storage-access-by-user-activation` : Lets the resource request access to the parent's storage capabilities with the [Storage Access API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Storage_Access_API). * `allow-top-navigation`: Lets the resource navigate the top-level browsing context (the one named `_top`). * `allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation`: Lets the resource navigate the top-level browsing context, but only if initiated by a user gesture.
**Notes about sandboxing:**
* When the embedded document has the same origin as the embedding page, it is **strongly discouraged** to use both `allow-scripts` and `allow-same-origin`, as that lets the embedded document remove the `sandbox` attribute — making it no more secure than not using the `sandbox` attribute at all. * Sandboxing is useless if the attacker can display content outside a sandboxed `iframe` — such as if the viewer opens the frame in a new tab. Such content should be also served from a _separate origin_ to limit potential damage. * The `sandbox` attribute is unsupported in Internet Explorer 9 and earlier.
trans-unit.target:
对框架中的内容应用额外限制。该属性的值可以为空，以应用所有限制；也可使用以空格分隔的标记来取消特定限制:
* `allow-forms`: 允许资源提交表单。如果不使用此关键字，则会阻止表单提交。 * `allow-modals`: 允许资源[打开模态窗口](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/origin.html#sandboxed-modals-flag)。 * `allow-orientation-lock`: 允许资源[锁定屏幕方向](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Screen/lockOrientation)。 * `allow-pointer-lock`: 允许资源使用[指针锁 API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/WebAPI/Pointer_Lock)。 * `allow-popups`: 允许弹出窗口，例如 `window.open()`、`target="_blank"` 或 `showModalDialog()`。如果不使用此关键字，弹出窗口会打开失败且不显示任何提示。 * `allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox`: 允许沙盒文档打开新窗口，而这些窗口不会继承沙盒限制。例如，可以安全地对广告进行沙盒处理，而不必对广告链接到的页面施加相同限制。 * `allow-presentation`: 允许资源启动[演示会话](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/PresentationRequest)。 * `allow-same-origin`: 如果不使用此标记，资源会被视为来自特殊源，并且始终无法通过[同源策略](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/same-origin_policy "同源策略: 同源策略是一项关键的安全机制，用于限制从一个源加载的文档或脚本与来自另一个源的资源进行交互的方式。")。 * `allow-scripts`: 允许资源运行脚本，但不能创建弹出窗口。 * `allow-storage-access-by-user-activation`: 允许资源通过[存储访问 API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Storage_Access_API)请求访问父级的存储功能。 * `allow-top-navigation`: 允许资源导航顶级浏览上下文(即，名为 `_top` 的上下文)。 * `allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation`: 允许资源导航顶级浏览上下文，但前提是由用户手势触发。
**关于沙盒的注意事项:**
* 当嵌入文档与嵌入页面具有相同源时，强烈建议不要同时使用 `allow-scripts` 和 `allow-same-origin`，因为这会让嵌入文档移除 `sandbox` 属性，这样就不会比完全不使用 `sandbox` 属性更安全。 * 如果攻击者可以在沙盒化的 `iframe` 外部显示内容，例如查看器在新选项卡中打开框架，则沙盒就没有意义。此类内容也应从独立源提供，以限制潜在损害。 * Internet Explorer 9 及耕地版本不支持 `sandbox` 属性。

trans-unit.source:
This attribute defines the scheme in which metadata is described. A scheme is a context leading to the correct interpretations of the [`content`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/meta#attr-content) value, like a format.
**Warning:** Do not use this value, as it is obsolete. There is no replacement as there was no real usage for it.
trans-unit.target:
此属性定义元数据的描述方案。方案是一种上下文，用于正确解释 [`content`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/meta#attr-content)值，例如某种格式。
**警告:** 请勿使用此值，因为它已经过时。由于它实际上从未被使用，因此没有替代方案。

trans-unit.source: If present, this Boolean attribute indicates that the option is initially selected. If the `<option>` element is the descendant of a [`<select>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/select "The HTML <select> element represents a control that provides a menu of options") element whose [`multiple`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/select#attr-multiple) attribute is not set, only one single `<option>` of this [`<select>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/select "The HTML <select> element represents a control that provides a menu of options") element may have the `selected` attribute.
trans-unit.target: 如果存在，此布尔特性会指示最初选择了该选项。如果 `<option>` 元素是未设置 [`multiple`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/select#attr-multiple)特性的 [`<select>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/select "HTML <select> 元素表示一个提供选项菜单的控件")元素的后代，则此 [`<select>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/select "HTML <select> 元素表示一个提供选项菜单的控件")元素中只能有一个 `<option>` 具有 `selected` 特性。

trans-unit.source:
If the control is presented as a scrolling list box (e.g. when `multiple` is specified), this attribute represents the number of rows in the list that should be visible at one time. Browsers are not required to present a select element as a scrolled list box. The default value is 0.
**Note:** According to the HTML5 specification, the default value for size should be 1; however, in practice, this has been found to break some web sites, and no other browser currently does that, so Mozilla has opted to continue to return 0 for the time being with Firefox.
trans-unit.target:
如果控件显示为可滚动列表框(例如，指定了 `multiple` 时)，则此属性表示列表中一次应显示的行数。不要求浏览器将 select 元素呈现为可滚动列表框。默认值是 0。
**注意:** 根据 HTML5 规范，size 的默认值应为 1；但在实践中，发现这会破坏一些网站，而且目前没有其他浏览器这样做，因此 Mozilla 选择在 Firefox 中暂时继续返回 0。

trans-unit.source:
This attribute defines the sizes of the icons for visual media contained in the resource. It must be present only if the [`rel`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/link#attr-rel) contains a value of `icon` or a non-standard type such as Apple's `apple-touch-icon`. It may have the following values:
* `any`, meaning that the icon can be scaled to any size as it is in a vector format, like `image/svg+xml`. * a white-space separated list of sizes, each in the format `_<width in pixels>_x_<height in pixels>_` or `_<width in pixels>_X_<height in pixels>_`. Each of these sizes must be contained in the resource.
**Note:** Most icon formats are only able to store one single icon; therefore most of the time the [`sizes`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes#attr-sizes) contains only one entry. MS's ICO format does, as well as Apple's ICNS. ICO is more ubiquitous; you should definitely use it.
trans-unit.target:
此属性定义资源中包含的视觉媒体图标的大小。只有当 [`rel`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/link#attr-rel)包含 `icon` 或非标准类型(例如 Apple 的 `apple-touch-icon`)的值时，才应包含此属性。它可以具有以下值:
* `any`，表示图标采用矢量格式时可缩放到任意大小，例如 `image/svg+xml`。 * 以空格分隔的大小列表，每个大小的格式为 `_<width in pixels>_x_<height in pixels>_` 或 `_<width in pixels>_X_<height in pixels>_`。这些大小都必须在资源中存在。
**注意:** 大多数图标格式只能存储一个图标，因此在大多数情况下，[`sizes`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes#attr-sizes)只包含一个条目。MS 的 ICO 格式和 Apple 的 ICNS 都支持这一点。ICO 更常见，建议优先使用。

trans-unit.source: Assigns a slot in a [shadow DOM](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/Web_Components/Shadow_DOM) shadow tree to an element: An element with a `slot` attribute is assigned to the slot created by the [`<slot>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTML/Element/slot "The HTML <slot> element—part of the Web Components technology suite—is a placeholder inside a web component that you can fill with your own markup, which lets you create separate DOM trees and present them together.") element whose `[name](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTML/Element/slot#attr-name)` attribute's value matches that `slot` attribute's value.
trans-unit.target: 将 [影子 DOM](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/Web_Components/Shadow_DOM)影子树中的槽分配给元素: 具有 `slot` 特性的元素被分配给由 [`<slot>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTML/Element/slot "HTML <slot> 元素是 Web Components 技术套件的一部分，它是 Web 组件内的一个占位符，可以在其中填充自己的标记，从而创建单独的 DOM 树并将它们一起呈现。")元素创建的槽，其 `[name](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTML/Element/slot#attr-name)` 特性的值与该 `slot` 特性的值匹配。

一个枚举属性，用于定义是否可检查元素的拼写错误。它可以具有以下值:
* `true`，表示如果可能，应检查元素是否有拼写错误； * `false`，表示不应检查元素是否有拼写错误。

trans-unit.source:
This attribute specifies the URI of an external script; this can be used as an alternative to embedding a script directly within a document.
If a `script` element has a `src` attribute specified, it should not have a script embedded inside its tags.
trans-unit.target:
此属性指定外部脚本的 URI；这可以作为直接在文档中嵌入脚本的替代方式。
如果 `script` 元素指定了 `src` 属性，则不应在其标记内嵌入脚本。

trans-unit.source: Inline HTML to embed, overriding the `src` attribute. If a browser does not support the `srcdoc` attribute, it will fall back to the URL in the `src` attribute.
trans-unit.target: 要嵌入的内联 HTML，替代 `src` 特性。如果浏览器不支持 `srcdoc` 特性，它将回退到 `src` 特性中的 URL。

trans-unit.source: Language of the track text data. It must be a valid [BCP 47](https://r12a.github.io/app-subtags/) language tag. If the `kind` attribute is set to `subtitles,` then `srclang` must be defined.
trans-unit.target: 轨道文本数据的语言。它必须是有效的 [BCP 47](https://r12a.github.io/app-subtags/)语言标记。如果将 `kind` 特性设置为 `subtitles,` 则必须定义 `srclang`。

trans-unit.source:
A list of one or more strings separated by commas indicating a set of possible image sources for the user agent to use. Each string is composed of:
1. a URL to an image, 2. optionally, whitespace followed by one of: * A width descriptor, or a positive integer directly followed by '`w`'. The width descriptor is divided by the source size given in the `sizes` attribute to calculate the effective pixel density. * A pixel density descriptor, which is a positive floating point number directly followed by '`x`'.
If no descriptor is specified, the source is assigned the default descriptor: `1x`.
It is incorrect to mix width descriptors and pixel density descriptors in the same `srcset` attribute. Duplicate descriptors (for instance, two sources in the same `srcset` which are both described with '`2x`') are also invalid.
The user agent selects any one of the available sources at its discretion. This provides them with significant leeway to tailor their selection based on things like user preferences or bandwidth conditions. See our [Responsive images](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/HTML/Multimedia_and_embedding/Responsive_images) tutorial for an example.
trans-unit.target:
一个由一个或多个字符串组成的逗号分隔列表，用于指示用户代理可使用的一组可能的图像源。每个字符串由以下内容组成:
1. 图像的 URL， 2. (可选)空白，后跟以下内容之一: * 宽度描述符，或后面直接跟 `w` 的正整数。宽度描述符会除以 `sizes` 属性中给定的源大小，以计算有效像素密度。 * 像素密度描述符，这是后面直接跟 `x` 的正浮点数。
如果未指定描述符，则为源分配默认描述符: `1x`。
在同一个 `srcset` 属性中混用宽度描述符和像素密度描述符属于错误行为。重复的描述符(例如，同一个 `srcset` 中两个都标有 `2x` 的源)也无效。
用户代理可自行选择任意一个可用源。这让它们在很大程度上可根据用户偏好或带宽状况等因素灵活调整选择。有关示例，请参阅我们的[响应式图片](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn/HTML/Multimedia_and_embedding/Responsive_images)教程。

trans-unit.source:
This integer attribute specifies the start value for numbering the individual list items. Although the ordering type of list elements might be Roman numerals, such as XXXI, or letters, the value of start is always represented as a number. To start numbering elements from the letter "C", use `<ol start="3">`.
**Note**: This attribute was deprecated in HTML4, but reintroduced in HTML5.
trans-unit.target:
此整数属性指定单个列表项编号的起始值。尽管列表元素的排序类型可能是罗马数字(如 XXXI)或字母，但 start 的值始终以数字表示。若要从字母 "C" 开始编号元素，请使用 `<ol start="3">`。
**注意**: 此属性在 HTML4 中已废弃，但在 HTML5 中重新引入。

trans-unit.source: Contains [CSS](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/CSS) styling declarations to be applied to the element. Note that it is recommended for styles to be defined in a separate file or files. This attribute and the [`<style>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTML/Element/style "The HTML <style> element contains style information for a document, or part of a document.") element have mainly the purpose of allowing for quick styling, for example for testing purposes.
trans-unit.target: 包含要应用于元素的 [CSS](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/CSS)样式声明。请注意，建议在单独的文件或多个文件中定义样式。此特性和 [`<style>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTML/Element/style "HTML <style> 元素包含文档或文档某一部分的样式信息。")元素主要用于允许快速样式设置，例如用于测试目的。

一个整数属性，指示元素是否可以获得输入焦点(即，是否不可聚焦)，是否应参与顺序键盘导航，以及如果参与，应处于什么位置。它可以采取以下几个值:
* 负值表示元素应可聚焦，但不应通过顺序键盘导航访问； * `0` 表示元素应可聚焦并可通过顺序键盘导航访问，但其相对顺序由平台约定定义； * 正值表示元素应可聚焦并可通过顺序键盘导航访问；元素获得焦点的顺序按 [**tabindex**](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTML/Reference/Global_attributes/tabindex#attr-tabindex)的递增值确定。如果多个元素具有相同的 tabindex，则它们的相对顺序按文档中的相对位置决定。

trans-unit.source:
A name or keyword indicating the default location to display the result when hyperlinks or forms cause navigation, for elements that do not have an explicit target reference. It is a name of, or keyword for, a _browsing context_ (for example: tab, window, or inline frame). The following keywords have special meanings:
* `_self`: Load the result into the same browsing context as the current one. This value is the default if the attribute is not specified. * `_blank`: Load the result into a new unnamed browsing context. * `_parent`: Load the result into the parent browsing context of the current one. If there is no parent, this option behaves the same way as `_self`. * `_top`: Load the result into the top-level browsing context (that is, the browsing context that is an ancestor of the current one, and has no parent). If there is no parent, this option behaves the same way as `_self`.
If this attribute is specified, this element must come before any other elements with attributes whose values are URLs.
trans-unit.target:
一个名称或关键字，指示超链接或表单导致导航时显示结果的默认位置，适用于没有显式目标引用的元素。它是浏览上下文(例如选项卡、窗口或内联框架)的名称或关键字。以下关键字具有特殊含义:
* `_self`: 将结果加载到与当前相同的浏览上下文中。如果未指定此属性，则这是默认值。 * `_blank`: 将结果加载到新的未命名浏览上下文中。 * `_parent`: 将结果加载到当前浏览上下文的父浏览上下文中。如果没有父级，则此选项的行为与 `_self` 相同。 * `_top`: 将结果加载到顶级浏览上下文中(即，当前浏览上下文的祖先，且没有父浏览上下文)。如果没有父级，则此选项的行为与 `_self` 相同。
如果指定了此属性，则此元素必须位于任何其他带有 URL 值的属性的元素之前。

trans-unit.source: Contains a text representing advisory information related to the element it belongs to. Such information can typically, but not necessarily, be presented to the user as a tooltip.
trans-unit.target: 包含一个文本，表示与它所属的元素相关的咨询信息。此类信息通常可以(但不一定)作为工具提示呈现给用户。

trans-unit.source:
An enumerated attribute that is used to specify whether an element's attribute values and the values of its [`Text`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Text "The Text interface represents the textual content of Element or Attr. If an element has no markup within its content, it has a single child implementing Text that contains the element's text. However, if the element contains markup, it is parsed into information items and Text nodes that form its children.") node children are to be translated when the page is localized, or whether to leave them unchanged. It can have the following values:
* empty string and `yes`, which indicates that the element will be translated. * `no`, which indicates that the element will not be translated.
trans-unit.target:
一个枚举属性，用于指定在页面本地化时，元素的属性值及其 [`Text`](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Text "Text 接口表示 Element 或 Attr 的文本内容。如果元素的内容中没有标记，则它有一个实现 Text 的子节点，其中包含该元素的文本。但是，如果元素包含标记，则会将其解析为构成其子节点的信息项和 Text 节点。")节点子级的值是否应被翻译，或者是否保持不变。它可以具有以下值:
* 空字符串和 `yes`，表示会翻译该元素。 * `no`，表示不会翻译该元素。

trans-unit.source: This attribute is used to define the type of the content linked to. The value of the attribute should be a MIME type such as **text/html**, **text/css**, and so on. The common use of this attribute is to define the type of stylesheet being referenced (such as **text/css**), but given that CSS is the only stylesheet language used on the web, not only is it possible to omit the `type` attribute, but is actually now recommended practice. It is also used on `rel="preload"` link types, to make sure the browser only downloads file types that it supports.
trans-unit.target: 此特性用于定义链接到的内容的类型。特性的值应为 MIME 类型，如 **text/html**、**text/css** 等。此特性的常见用途是定义要引用的样式表的类型(如 **text/css**)，但鉴于 CSS 是 Web 上使用的唯一样式表语言，不仅可以省略 `type` 特性，而且现在实际上推荐这样做。它还用于 `rel="preload"` 链接类型，以确保浏览器仅下载它支持的文件类型。

trans-unit.source: The partial URL (starting with '#') of an [image map](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/HTML/Element/map) associated with the element. **Note:** You cannot use this attribute if the `` element is a descendant of an [``](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/a "The HTML element (or anchor element) creates a hyperlink to other web pages, files, locations within the same page, email addresses, or any other URL.") or [`
trans-unit.target: 与元素关联的[图像映射](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/HTML/Element/map)的部分URL (以 "#" 开头)。 **注意:** 如果 `` 元素是 [``](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/a "HTML 元素(或 anchor 元素)创建指向其他网页、文件、同一页面内的位置、电子邮件地址或任何其他 URL 的超链接")或 [`

trans-unit.source:
This integer attribute indicates the current ordinal value of the list item as defined by the [`<ol>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/ol "The HTML <ol> element represents an ordered list of items, typically rendered as a numbered list.") element. The only allowed value for this attribute is a number, even if the list is displayed with Roman numerals or letters. List items that follow this one continue numbering from the value set. The **value** attribute has no meaning for unordered lists ([`<ul>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/ul "The HTML <ul> element represents an unordered list of items, typically rendered as a bulleted list.")) or for menus ([`<menu>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/menu "The HTML <menu> element represents a group of commands that a user can perform or activate. This includes both list menus, which might appear across the top of a screen, as well as context menus, such as those that might appear underneath a button after it has been clicked.")).
**Note**: This attribute was deprecated in HTML4, but reintroduced in HTML5.
**Note:** Prior to Gecko 9.0, negative values were incorrectly converted to 0. Starting in Gecko 9.0 all integer values are correctly parsed.
trans-unit.target:
此整数属性表示由 [`<ol>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/ol "HTML <ol> 元素表示一个有序的项目列表，通常以项目符号列表形式呈现。")元素定义的列表项当前序号。此属性唯一允许的值是数字，即使列表显示为罗马数字或字母也是如此。其后的列表项会从此值集继续编号。value 属性对无序列表([`<ul>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/ul "HTML <ul> 元素表示一个无序的项目列表，通常以项目符号列表形式呈现。"))或菜单([`<menu>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/menu "HTML <menu> 元素表示一组用户可执行或激活的命令。其中包含列表菜单(可能跨屏幕顶部显示)和上下文菜单(例如单击后可能显示在按钮下方的上下文菜单)。"))来说没有意义。
**注意**: 此属性在 HTML4 中已弃用，但在 HTML5 中重新引入。
**注意:** 在 Gecko 9.0 之前，负值会被错误地转换为 0。从 Gecko 9.0 开始，所有整数值都能被正确解析。

trans-unit.source:
Specifies the type of the `value` attribute. Possible values are:
* data: Default value. The value is passed to the object's implementation as a string. * ref: The value is a URI to a resource where run-time values are stored. * object: An ID of another [`<object>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/object "The HTML <object> element represents an external resource, which can be treated as an image, a nested browsing context, or a resource to be handled by a plugin.") in the same document.
trans-unit.target:
指定 `value` 属性的类型。可能的值包括:
* data: 默认值。该值作为字符串传递给对象的实现。 * ref: 该值是指向存储运行时值的资源的 URI。 * object: 同一文档中另一个 [`<object>`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/object "HTML <object> 元素表示外部资源，可将其视为图像、嵌套浏览上下文或由插件处理的资源。")的 ID。

trans-unit.source: When specified on an element that the element's content is editable (for example, it is an `<input>` or `<textarea>` element, or an element with the `contenteditable` attribute set), it controls the on-screen virtual keyboard behavior on devices such as tablets, mobile phones, or other devices where a hardware keyboard may not be available.
trans-unit.target: 当在某个元素上指定元素的内容可编辑时(例如，它是 `<input>` 或 `<textarea>` 元素，或者是设置了 `contenteditable` 特性的元素)，它控制平板电脑、移动电话或其他可能无法使用硬件键盘的设备上的屏幕虚拟键盘行为。

trans-unit.source: The intrinsic width of the image in pixels.
trans-unit.target: 图像的固有宽度(以像素为单位)。

trans-unit.source:
Indicates how the control wraps text. Possible values are:
* `hard`: The browser automatically inserts line breaks (CR+LF) so that each line has no more than the width of the control; the `cols` attribute must also be specified for this to take effect. * `soft`: The browser ensures that all line breaks in the value consist of a CR+LF pair, but does not insert any additional line breaks. * `off` : Like `soft` but changes appearance to `white-space: pre` so line segments exceeding `cols` are not wrapped and the `<textarea>` becomes horizontally scrollable.
If this attribute is not specified, `soft` is its default value.
trans-unit.target:
指示控件如何换行文本。可能的值包含:
* `hard`: 浏览器会自动插入换行符(CR+LF)，使每一行不超过控件宽度；要使此项生效，还必须指定 `cols` 属性。 * `soft`: 浏览器确保值中的所有换行符都由 CR+LF 对组成，但不会插入其他换行符。 * `off`: 与 `soft` 类似，但会将外观改为 `white-space: pre`，因此超出 `cols` 的文本不会换行，而 `<textarea>` 会变为可水平滚动。
如果未指定此属性，默认值为 `soft`。

trans-unit.source: If the a element has an href attribute, then it represents a hyperlink (a hypertext anchor) labeled by its contents.
trans-unit.target: 如果 a 元素具有 href 属性，则该元素表示由其内容标记的超链接(超文本定位)。

trans-unit.source: The abbr element represents an abbreviation or acronym, optionally with its expansion. The title attribute may be used to provide an expansion of the abbreviation. The attribute, if specified, must contain an expansion of the abbreviation, and nothing else.
trans-unit.target: abbr 元素表示缩写或首字母缩略词，可带有其扩展。可使用 title 属性提供该缩写的扩展。如果指定，则该属性必须包含该缩写的扩展，而不包含其他任何内容。

trans-unit.source: The address element represents the contact information for its nearest article or body element ancestor. If that is the body element, then the contact information applies to the document as a whole.
trans-unit.target: address 元素表示最近的 article 或 body 元素上级的联系信息。如果该元素是 body 元素，则该联系信息全部都适用于文档。

trans-unit.source: The area element represents either a hyperlink with some text and a corresponding area on an image map, or a dead area on an image map.
trans-unit.target: area 元素表示图像地图上一个带有某些文本的超链接和相应区域，或图像地图上的死区域。

trans-unit.source: The article element represents a complete, or self-contained, composition in a document, page, application, or site and that is, in principle, independently distributable or reusable, e.g. in syndication. This could be a forum post, a magazine or newspaper article, a blog entry, a user-submitted comment, an interactive widget or gadget, or any other independent item of content. Each article should be identified, typically by including a heading (h1–h6 element) as a child of the article element.
trans-unit.target: article 元素表示文档、页面、应用程序或站点中的完整或自包含组合，从原则上讲，该元素可独立分发或重使用，例如以联合形式。此元素可能是论坛帖子、杂志或报纸文章、博客条目、用户提交的评论、交互式小工具，或其他任何无关的内容项。应标识每篇文章，通常通过将标题(h1–h6 元素)作为项目元素的子元素进行标识。

trans-unit.source: The aside element represents a section of a page that consists of content that is tangentially related to the content around the aside element, and which could be considered separate from that content. Such sections are often represented as sidebars in printed typography.
trans-unit.target: aside 元素表示页面的某个部分，该部分包含与 aside 元素周围的内容略微相关的内容，以及可能被认为与该内容分隔开的内容。这些部分在打印版式中通常表示为边栏。

trans-unit.source: An audio element represents a sound or audio stream.
trans-unit.target: audio 元素表示声音或音频流。

trans-unit.source: The b element represents a span of text to which attention is being drawn for utilitarian purposes without conveying any extra importance and with no implication of an alternate voice or mood, such as key words in a document abstract, product names in a review, actionable words in interactive text-driven software, or an article lede.
trans-unit.target: b 元素表示一段文本，该文本出于实用目的受到关注，不必传达任何额外的重要性，并且不指示备选语态或语气，例如文档摘要中的关键字、接受检查的产品名称、交互式的文本驱动软件中的可操作单词或文章导语。

trans-unit.source: The base element allows authors to specify the document base URL for the purposes of resolving relative URLs, and the name of the default browsing context for the purposes of following hyperlinks. The element does not represent any content beyond this information.
trans-unit.target: base 元素允许作者指定文档基 URL 以便解析相对 URL，以及指定默认浏览上下文的名称以便打开超链接。该元素不表示此信息以外的任何内容。

trans-unit.source: The bdi element represents a span of text that is to be isolated from its surroundings for the purposes of bidirectional text formatting. [BIDI]
trans-unit.target: bdi 元素表示一段文本，该文本要与其周围内容隔离，以用于双向文本格式化。[BIDI]

trans-unit.source: The bdo element represents explicit text directionality formatting control for its children. It allows authors to override the Unicode bidirectional algorithm by explicitly specifying a direction override. [BIDI]
trans-unit.target: bdo 元素表示其子级的显式文本方向性格式化控件。该元素允许作者通过明确指定方向替代来替代 Unicode 双向算法。[BIDI]

trans-unit.source: The blockquote element represents content that is quoted from another source, optionally with a citation which must be within a footer or cite element, and optionally with in-line changes such as annotations and abbreviations.
trans-unit.target: blockquote 元素表示从其他源中引用的内容，可以带有必须位于 footer 或 cite 元素中的引文，也可以带有批注和缩写等行内更改。

trans-unit.source: The body element represents the content of the document.
trans-unit.target: body 元素表示文档的内容。

trans-unit.source: The br element represents a line break.
trans-unit.target: br 元素表示换行符。

trans-unit.source: The button element represents a button labeled by its contents.
trans-unit.target: button 元素表示由其内容标记的按钮。

trans-unit.source: The canvas element provides scripts with a resolution-dependent bitmap canvas, which can be used for rendering graphs, game graphics, art, or other visual images on the fly.
trans-unit.target: canvas 元素为脚本提供与分辨率有关的位图画布，该画布可用于动态呈现图形、游戏图形、艺术或其他可视图像。

trans-unit.source: The caption element represents the title of the table that is its parent, if it has a parent and that is a table element.
trans-unit.target: caption 元素表示作为其父级的表的标题(如果它有父级，并且该父级是 table 元素)。

trans-unit.source: The cite element represents a reference to a creative work. It must include the title of the work or the name of the author(person, people or organization) or an URL reference, or a reference in abbreviated form as per the conventions used for the addition of citation metadata.
trans-unit.target: cite 元素表示对创意作品的引用。该元素必须包含作品的标题或作者(个人、团体或组织)的名称或 URL 引用，或者按照添加引文元数据的约定以缩写形式提供的引用。

trans-unit.source: The code element represents a fragment of computer code. This could be an XML element name, a file name, a computer program, or any other string that a computer would recognize.
trans-unit.target: code 元素表示计算机代码的片段。这可以是 XML 元素名称、文件名、计算机程序，或计算机可识别的其他任何字符串。

trans-unit.source: If a col element has a parent and that is a colgroup element that itself has a parent that is a table element, then the col element represents one or more columns in the column group represented by that colgroup.
trans-unit.target: 如果 col 元素有父级，并且该父级是 colgroup 元素且自身有作为 table 元素的父级，则该 col 元素表示由该 colgroup 表示的列组中的一个或多个列。

trans-unit.source: The colgroup element represents a group of one or more columns in the table that is its parent, if it has a parent and that is a table element.
trans-unit.target: colgroup 元素表示作为其父级的表中的一个或多个列组(如果它有父级，并且该父级是 table 元素)。

trans-unit.source: The command element represents a command that the user can invoke.
trans-unit.target: command 元素表示用户可调用的命令。

trans-unit.source: The content element represents an insertion point in the shadow tree.
trans-unit.target: content 元素表示阴影树中的插入点。

trans-unit.source: The data element links a given piece of content with a machine-readable translation.
trans-unit.target: 数据元素将给定的内容与机器可读的翻译关联起来。

trans-unit.source: The datalist element represents a set of option elements that represent predefined options for other controls. In the rendering, the datalist element represents nothing and it, along with its children, should be hidden.
trans-unit.target: datalist 元素表示一组 option 元素，这些元素表示其他控件的预定义选项。在呈现时，datalist 元素不表示任何内容，该元素及其子级应被隐藏。

trans-unit.source: The dd element represents the description, definition, or value, part of a term-description group in a description list (dl element).
trans-unit.target: dd 元素表示描述、定义或值，即描述列表(dl 元素)中术语描述组的一部分。

trans-unit.source: The del element represents a removal from the document.
trans-unit.target: del 元素表示从文档中删除。

trans-unit.source: The details element represents a disclosure widget from which the user can obtain additional information or controls.
trans-unit.target: details 元素表示用户可以从中获取其他信息或控件的公开小组件。

trans-unit.source: The dfn element represents the defining instance of a term. The paragraph, description list group, or section that is the nearest ancestor of the dfn element must also contain the definition(s) for the term given by the dfn element.
trans-unit.target: dfn 元素表示术语的定义实例。作为 dfn 元素最近上级的段落、描述列表组或部分还必须包含由该 dfn 元素提供的术语的定义。

trans-unit.source: The dialog element represents a part of an application that a user interacts with to perform a task, for example a dialog box, inspector, or window.
trans-unit.target: dialog 元素表示用户为了执行任务而与之交互的应用程序的一部分，例如，对话框、检查器或窗口。

trans-unit.source: The div element has no special meaning at all. It represents its children. It can be used with the class, lang, and title attributes to mark up semantics common to a group of consecutive elements.
trans-unit.target: div 元素根本没有特殊含义。该元素表示其子级。它可与 class、lang 和 title 属性一起用于标记一组连续元素通用的语义。

trans-unit.source: The dl element represents an association list consisting of zero or more name-value groups (a description list). A name-value group consists of one or more names (dt elements) followed by one or more values (dd elements), ignoring any nodes other than dt and dd elements. Within a single dl element, there should not be more than one dt element for each name.
trans-unit.target: dl 元素表示包含零个或多个名称/值组的关联列表(描述列表)。名称/值组包含一个或多个名称(dt 元素)，后跟一个或多个值(dd 元素)，从而忽略 dt 和 dd 元素之外的任何节点。在单个 dl 元素中，每个名称都不能有多个 dt 元素。

trans-unit.source: The dt element represents the term, or name, part of a term-description group in a description list (dl element).
trans-unit.target: dt 元素表示术语或名称，即描述列表(dl 元素)中术语描述组的一部分。

trans-unit.source: The em element represents stress emphasis of its contents.
trans-unit.target: em 元素表示对其内容的强调。

trans-unit.source: The embed element provides an integration point for an external (typically non-HTML) application or interactive content.
trans-unit.target: embed 元素为外部(通常是非 HTML)应用程序或交互式内容提供集成点。

trans-unit.source: The fieldset element represents a set of form controls optionally grouped under a common name.
trans-unit.target: fieldset 元素表示一组可以按常见名称分组的表单控件。

trans-unit.source: The figure element represents some flow content, optionally with a caption, that is self-contained (like a complete sentence) and is typically referenced as a single unit from the main flow of the document.
trans-unit.target: figure 元素表示一些可以带有标题的自包含流内容(例如完整句子)，通常在文档的主要流中引用为单个单元。

trans-unit.source: The footer element represents a footer for its nearest ancestor sectioning content or sectioning root element. A footer typically contains information about its section such as who wrote it, links to related documents, copyright data, and the like.
trans-unit.target: footer 元素表示最近的上级分区内容或分区根元素的脚注。脚注通常包含与其所在部分相关的信息，例如编写者、指向相关文档的链接、版权数据等等。

trans-unit.source: The form element represents a collection of form-associated elements, some of which can represent editable values that can be submitted to a server for processing.
trans-unit.target: form 元素表示与表单关联的元素的集合，其中一些元素可以表示可编辑值，这些值可提交到服务器进行处理。

trans-unit.source: The h1 element represents a section heading.
trans-unit.target: h1 元素表示节标题。

trans-unit.source: The h2 element represents a section heading.
trans-unit.target: h2 元素表示节标题。

trans-unit.source: The h3 element represents a section heading.
trans-unit.target: h3 元素表示节标题。

trans-unit.source: The h4 element represents a section heading.
trans-unit.target: h4 元素表示节标题。

trans-unit.source: The h5 element represents a section heading.
trans-unit.target: h5 元素表示节标题。

trans-unit.source: The h6 element represents a section heading.
trans-unit.target: h6 元素表示节标题。

trans-unit.source: The head element represents a collection of metadata for the Document.
trans-unit.target: head 元素表示文档的元数据集合。

trans-unit.source: The header element represents introductory content for its nearest ancestor sectioning content or sectioning root element. A header typically contains a group of introductory or navigational aids. When the nearest ancestor sectioning content or sectioning root element is the body element, then it applies to the whole page.
trans-unit.target: header 元素表示最近的上级分区内容或分区根元素的介绍性内容。标题通常包含一组介绍性或导航帮助。当最近的上级分区内容或分区根元素是正文元素时，它将应用于整个页面。

trans-unit.source: The hr element represents a paragraph-level thematic break, e.g. a scene change in a story, or a transition to another topic within a section of a reference book.
trans-unit.target: hr 元素表示段落级别主题间隔，例如故事中的场景变化或向参考书的某个章节中的另一个主题转换。

trans-unit.source: The html element represents the root of an HTML document.
trans-unit.target: html 元素表示 HTML 文档的根。

trans-unit.source: The i element represents a span of text in an alternate voice or mood, or otherwise offset from the normal prose in a manner indicating a different quality of text, such as a taxonomic designation, a technical term, an idiomatic phrase from another language, transliteration, a thought, or a ship name in Western texts.
trans-unit.target: i 元素表示采用备选语态或语气的一段文本，或以指示不同文本质量的方式表示的与常规文本的偏移量，例如分类指定、技术术语、其他语言的惯用短语、音译、想法或采用西方文本的船舶名称。

trans-unit.source: The iframe element represents a nested browsing context.
trans-unit.target: iframe 元素表示嵌套的浏览上下文。

trans-unit.source: An img element represents an image.
trans-unit.target: img 元素表示图像。

trans-unit.source: The input element represents a typed data field, usually with a form control to allow the user to edit the data.
trans-unit.target: input 元素表示类型化数据字段，通常带有允许用户编辑数据的表单控件。

trans-unit.source: The ins element represents an addition to the document.
trans-unit.target: ins 元素表示添加到文档中。

trans-unit.source: The kbd element represents user input (typically keyboard input, although it may also be used to represent other input, such as voice commands).
trans-unit.target: kbd 元素表示用户输入(通常是键盘输入，尽管该元素可能还用于表示语音命令等其他输入)。

trans-unit.source: The label element represents a caption in a user interface. The caption can be associated with a specific form control, known as the label element's labeled control, either using the for attribute, or by putting the form control inside the label element itself.
trans-unit.target: label 元素表示用户界面中的标题。该标题可与特定表单控件(称为 label 元素的标记控件)关联，方法是使用 for 属性，或将表单控件放在 label 元素自身内。

trans-unit.source: The legend element represents a caption for the rest of the contents of the legend element's parent fieldset element, if any.
trans-unit.target: legend 元素表示该 legend 元素的父 fieldset 元素(如果有)的其余内容的标题。

trans-unit.source: The li element represents a list item. If its parent element is an ol, ul, or menu element, then the element is an item of the parent element's list, as defined for those elements. Otherwise, the list item has no defined list-related relationship to any other li element.
trans-unit.target: li 元素表示列表项。如果其父元素是 ol、ul 或 menu 元素，则该元素是父元素列表的项，如这些元素所定义。否则，该列表项与其他任何 li 元素没有已定义的列表相关关系。

trans-unit.source: The link element allows authors to link their document to other resources.
trans-unit.target: link 元素允许作者将其文档链接到其他资源。

trans-unit.source: The main element represents the main content of the body of a document or application. The main content area consists of content that is directly related to or expands upon the central topic of a document or central functionality of an application.
trans-unit.target: main 元素表示文档或应用程序正文的主要内容。主要内容区域中的内容与文档的中心主题或应用程序的中心功能直接相关，或根据该中心主题或中心功能进行扩展。

trans-unit.source: The map element, in conjunction with an img element and any area element descendants, defines an image map. The element represents its children.
trans-unit.target: map 元素，与 img 元素和任何 area 元素后代一起用于定义图像地图。该元素表示其子级。

trans-unit.source: The mark element represents a run of text in one document marked or highlighted for reference purposes, due to its relevance in another context. When used in a quotation or other block of text referred to from the prose, it indicates a highlight that was not originally present but which has been added to bring the reader's attention to a part of the text that might not have been considered important by the original author when the block was originally written, but which is now under previously unexpected scrutiny. When used in the main prose of a document, it indicates a part of the document that has been highlighted due to its likely relevance to the user's current activity.
trans-unit.target: mark 元素表示一个文档中的一连串文本，这些文本由于其在另一个上下文中的相关性而进行了标记或突出显示，以实现引用目的。如果在从文本中引用的引文或其他文本块中使用，则该元素指示突出显示，该突出显示原先并不存在，但已添加以将读者的注意力吸引到原作者在最初编写块时可能未被视为重要而现在正在接受以前未预料到的仔细查阅的文本部分。如果在文档的主要文本中使用，该元素指示由于其可能与用户的当前活动相关而已突出显示的文档部分。

trans-unit.source: The math element from the MathML namespace falls into the embedded content, phrasing content, and flow content categories for the purposes of the content models in this specification.
trans-unit.target: MathML 命名空间中的 math 元素归入嵌入内容、分段内容和流内容类别，以用于此规范中的内容模型。

trans-unit.source: The menu element represents an unordered list of interactive items.
trans-unit.target: menu 元素表示交互式项的无序列表。

trans-unit.source: The menuitem element represents a command that the user can invoke from a popup menu (either a context menu or the menu of a menu button).
trans-unit.target: menuitem 元素表示用户可从弹出菜单(上下文菜单或菜单按钮的菜单)中调用的命令。

trans-unit.source: The meta element represents various kinds of metadata that cannot be expressed using the title, base, link, style, and script elements.
trans-unit.target: meta 元素表示不能使用 title、base、link、style 和 script 元素表示的各种元数据。

trans-unit.source: The meter element represents a scalar measurement within a known range, or a fractional value; for example disk usage, the relevance of a query result, or the fraction of a voting population to have selected a particular candidate.
trans-unit.target: meter 元素表示已知范围内的标量度量或分数值; 例如磁盘使用量、查询结果的相关性，或已选择特定候选人的投票人的分数。

trans-unit.source: The nav element represents a section of a page that links to other pages or to parts within the page: a section with navigation links.
trans-unit.target: nav 元素表示页面中链接到其他页面或该页面中的部分的某个部分: 包含导航链接的部分。

trans-unit.source: An element used by the AngularJS JavaScript library.
trans-unit.target: 由 AngularJS JavaScript 库使用的元素。

trans-unit.source: An element used by the AngularJS JavaScript library.
trans-unit.target: 由 AngularJS JavaScript 库使用的元素。

trans-unit.source: An element used by the AngularJS JavaScript library.
trans-unit.target: 由 AngularJS JavaScript 库使用的元素。

trans-unit.source: An element used by the AngularJS JavaScript library.
trans-unit.target: 由 AngularJS JavaScript 库使用的元素。

trans-unit.source: An element used by the AngularJS JavaScript library.
trans-unit.target: 由 AngularJS JavaScript 库使用的元素。

trans-unit.source: The noscript element represents nothing if scripting is enabled, and represents its children if scripting is disabled. It is used to present different markup to user agents that support scripting and those that don't support scripting, by affecting how the document is parsed.
trans-unit.target: noscript 元素不表示任何内容(如果启用脚本编写)，或表示其子级(如果禁用脚本编写)。该元素用于通过影响文档的分析方式来为支持脚本编写和不支持脚本编写的用户代理提供不同标记。

trans-unit.source: The object element can represent an external resource, which, depending on the type of the resource, will either be treated as an image, as a nested browsing context, or as an external resource to be processed by a plugin.
trans-unit.target: object 元素可表示外部资源，根据资源类型，该资源将被视为图像、嵌套的浏览上下文，或要由插件处理的外部资源。

trans-unit.source: The ol element represents a list of items, where the items have been intentionally ordered, such that changing the order would change the meaning of the document.
trans-unit.target: ol 元素表示项目列表，其中项目已特意经过排序，以致更改顺序会更改文档的含义。

trans-unit.source: The optgroup element represents a group of option elements with a common label.
trans-unit.target: optgroup 元素表示带有常见标签的一组 option 元素。

trans-unit.source: The option element represents an option in a select element or as part of a list of suggestions in a datalist element.
trans-unit.target: option 元素表示 select 元素中的选项，或 datalist 元素中的建议列表的一部分。

trans-unit.source: The output element represents the result of a calculation performed by the application, or the result of a user action.
trans-unit.target: output 元素表示应用程序执行的计算结果或用户操作的结果。

trans-unit.source: The p element represents a paragraph.
trans-unit.target: p 元素表示段落。

trans-unit.source: The param element defines parameters for plugins invoked by object elements. It does not represent anything on its own.
trans-unit.target: param 元素为 object 元素所调用的插件定义参数。该元素本身不表示任何内容。

trans-unit.source: The picture element is a container which provides multiple sources to its contained img element to allow authors to declaratively control or give hints to the user agent about which image resource to use, based on the screen pixel density, viewport size, image format, and other factors. It represents its children.
trans-unit.target: picture 元素是一个容器，它为其包含的 img 元素提供多个源，从而允许作者以声明方式，基于屏幕像素密度、视区大小、图像格式和其他因素控制要使用的图像资源或为用户代理提供其相关提示。该元素表示其子级。

trans-unit.source: A polymer-element is used to create new HTML elements using the Polymer JavaScript library.
trans-unit.target: 聚合元素用于使用 Polymer JavaScript 库创建新的 HTML 元素。

trans-unit.source: The pre element represents a block of preformatted text, in which structure is represented by typographic conventions rather than by elements.
trans-unit.target: pre 元素表示预设了格式的文本块，在该块中，结构由排字约定而非元素来表示。

trans-unit.source: The progress element represents the completion progress of a task. The progress is either indeterminate, indicating that progress is being made but that it is not clear how much more work remains to be done before the task is complete (e.g. because the task is waiting for a remote host to respond), or the progress is a number in the range zero to a maximum, giving the fraction of work that has so far been completed.
trans-unit.target: progress 元素表示任务的完成进度。该进度要么不确定，即指示任务正在进行，但不清楚在任务完成前还有多少工作要做(例如因为该任务正在等待远程主机响应)，要么该进度是零到最大值范围内的一个数字，这提供了迄今为止已完成的工作的分数。

trans-unit.source: The q element represents some phrasing content quoted from another source.
trans-unit.target: q 元素表示一些从其他源中引用的分段内容。

trans-unit.source: The rp element is used to provide fallback text to be shown by user agents that don't support ruby annotations. One widespread convention is to provide parentheses around the ruby text component of a ruby annotation.
trans-unit.target: rp 元素用于提供备用文本，这些文本将由不支持 Ruby 注音批注的用户代理显示。一种广泛使用的惯例是在 Ruby 注音批注的 Ruby 注音文本组件周围加上圆括号。

trans-unit.source: The rt element marks the ruby text component of a ruby annotation. When it is the child of a ruby element or of an rtc element that is itself the child of a ruby element, it doesn't represent anything itself, but its ancestor ruby element uses it as part of determining what it represents.
trans-unit.target: rt 元素标记 Ruby 注音批注的 Ruby 注音文本组件。当它是 ruby 元素或 rtc 元素(本身是 ruby 元素的子级)的子级时，它本身不表示任何内容，但其上级 ruby 元素在确定它所表示的内容时使用它。

trans-unit.source: The rtc element marks a ruby text container for ruby text components in a ruby annotation. When it is the child of a ruby element it doesn't represent anything itself, but its parent ruby element uses it as part of determining what it represents.
trans-unit.target: rtc 元素标记 Ruby 注音标注中 Ruby 注音文本组件的 Ruby 注音文本容器。当它是 ruby 元素的子级时，它本身不表示任何内容，但它的父级 ruby 元素在确定它所表示的内容时使用它。

trans-unit.source: The ruby element allows one or more spans of phrasing content to be marked with ruby annotations. Ruby annotations are short runs of text presented alongside base text, primarily used in East Asian typography as a guide for pronunciation or to include other annotations. In Japanese, this form of typography is also known as furigana. Ruby text can appear on either side, and sometimes both sides, of the base text, and it is possible to control its position using CSS. A more complete introduction to ruby can be found in the Use Cases & Exploratory Approaches for Ruby Markup document as well as in CSS Ruby Module Level 1. [RUBY-UC] [CSSRUBY]
trans-unit.target: ruby 元素允许一个或多个跨度的短语内容使用 Ruby 注音批注进行标记。Ruby 注音批注是在基本文本旁边呈现的简短文本，主要在东亚版式中用作发音指南，或者用于包括其他批注。在日语中，这种形式的版式也称为汉字注音。Ruby 注音文本可以出现在基本文本的任一侧(有时是两侧)，并且可以使用 CSS 控制其位置。可在《Ruby 标记的用例和探索方法》文档以及“CSS Ruby 模块级别 1”中找到更完整的 ruby 简介。[RUBY-UC] [CSSRUBY]

trans-unit.source: The s element represents contents that are no longer accurate or no longer relevant.
trans-unit.target: s 元素表示不再准确或不再相关的内容。

trans-unit.source: The samp element represents sample or quoted output from another program or computing system.
trans-unit.target: samp 元素表示来自另一个程序或计算系统的示例或引用的输出。

trans-unit.source: The script element allows authors to include dynamic script and data blocks in their documents. The element does not represent content for the user.
trans-unit.target: script 元素允许作者在其文档中包括动态脚本和数据块。该元素不表示用户的内容。

trans-unit.source: The search element represents the parts of the document or application with form controls or other content related to performing a search or filtering operation.
trans-unit.target: 搜索元素表示文档或应用程序中包含与执行搜索或筛选操作相关的窗体控件或其他内容的部分。

trans-unit.source: The section element represents a generic section of a document or application. A section, in this context, is a thematic grouping of content. Each section should be identified, typically by including a heading ( h1- h6 element) as a child of the section element.
trans-unit.target: section 元素表示文档或应用程序的通用节。在此上下文中，节是内容的主题分组。应标识每节，方法通常是将标题(h1-h6 元素)作为 section 元素的子级包括在内。

trans-unit.source: The select element represents a control for selecting amongst a set of options.
trans-unit.target: select 元素表示用于在一组选项中进行选择的控件。

trans-unit.source: The shadow element represents an shadow insertion point in a shadow tree.
trans-unit.target: shadow 元素表示阴影树中的阴影插入点。

trans-unit.source: The slot element is a placeholder inside a web component that you can fill with your own markup, which lets you create separate DOM trees and present them together.
trans-unit.target: 槽元素是 Web 组件中的一个占位符，可以使用自己的标记进行填充，从而创建单独的 DOM 树并将其一起呈现。

trans-unit.source: The small element represents side comments such as small print.
trans-unit.target: small 元素表示边注，例如小号字体。

trans-unit.source: The source element allows authors to specify multiple alternative media resources for media elements. It does not represent anything on its own.
trans-unit.target: source 元素允许作者为媒体元素指定多个备选媒体资源。该元素本身不表示任何内容。

trans-unit.source: The span element doesn't mean anything on its own, but can be useful when used together with the global attributes, e.g. class, lang, or dir. It represents its children.
trans-unit.target: span 元素本身不表示任何内容，但与全局属性(例如 class、lang 或 dir)一起使用时可能很有用。该元素表示其子级。

trans-unit.source: The strong element represents strong importance, seriousness, or urgency for its contents.
trans-unit.target: strong 元素表示其内容很强的重要性、严重性或紧急性。

trans-unit.source: The style element allows authors to embed style information in their documents. The style element is one of several inputs to the styling processing model. The element does not represent content for the user.
trans-unit.target: style 元素允许作者将样式信息嵌入在其文档中。该 style 元素是样式化处理模型的多个输入之一。该元素不表示用户的内容。

trans-unit.source: The sub element represents a subscript.
trans-unit.target: sub 元素表示下标。

trans-unit.source: The summary element represents a summary, caption, or legend for the rest of the contents of the summary element's parent details element, if any.
trans-unit.target: summary 元素表示 summary 元素的父 details 元素(如果有)的其余内容的摘要、标题或图例。

trans-unit.source: The sup element represents a superscript.
trans-unit.target: sup 元素表示上标。

trans-unit.source: The svg element from the SVG namespace falls into the embedded content, phrasing content, and flow content categories for the purposes of the content models in this specification.
trans-unit.target: SVG 命名空间中的 svg 元素归入嵌入内容、分段内容和流内容类别，以用于此规范中的内容模型。

trans-unit.source: The table element represents data with more than one dimension, in the form of a table.
trans-unit.target: table 元素以表的形式表示具有多个维度的数据。

trans-unit.source: The tbody element represents a block of rows that consist of a body of data for the parent table element, if the tbody element has a parent and it is a table.
trans-unit.target: tbody 元素表示行块，这些行包含父 table 元素的数据正文(如果 tbody 元素有父级，并且该父级是表)。

trans-unit.source: The td element represents a data cell in a table.
trans-unit.target: td 元素表示表中的数据单元格。

trans-unit.source: The template element is used to declare fragments of HTML that can be cloned and inserted in the document by script.
trans-unit.target: template 元素用于声明可由脚本克隆并插入文档中的 HTML 片段。

trans-unit.source: The textarea element represents a multiline plain text edit control for the element's raw value. The contents of the control represent the control's default value.
trans-unit.target: textarea 元素表示该元素的原始值的多个纯文本编辑控件。该控件的内容表示该控件的默认值。

trans-unit.source: The tfoot element represents the block of rows that consist of the column summaries (footers) for the parent table element, if the tfoot element has a parent and it is a table.
trans-unit.target: tfoot 元素表示由父 table 元素的列摘要(页脚)组成的行块，前提是 tfoot 元素存在父元素且该父元素为 table。

trans-unit.source: The th element represents a header cell in a table.
trans-unit.target: th 元素表示表中的标题单元格。

trans-unit.source: The thead element represents the block of rows that consist of the column labels (headers) for the parent table element, if the thead element has a parent and it is a table.
trans-unit.target: thead 元素表示行块，这些行包含父 table 元素的列标签(标题)，前提是 thead 元素有父级，并且该父级是表。

trans-unit.source: The time element represents its contents, along with a machine-readable form of those contents in the datetime attribute. The kind of content is limited to various kinds of dates, times, time-zone offsets, and durations, as described below.
trans-unit.target: time 元素表示其内容，以及这些内容在 datetime 属性中的计算机可读形式。此类内容限于各种类型的日期、时间、时区偏移量和持续时间，如下所述。

trans-unit.source: The title element represents the document's title or name. Authors should use titles that identify their documents even when they are used out of context, for example in a user's history or bookmarks, or in search results. The document's title is often different from its first heading, since the first heading does not have to stand alone when taken out of context.
trans-unit.target: title 元素表示文档的标题或名称。作者应使用标题以标识其文档，即使它们不在上下文中使用，例如在用户的历史记录或书签或搜索结果中使用。该文档的标题通常不同于其第一个标题，因为第一个标题在移出上下文时未必是孤立的。

trans-unit.source: The tr element represents a row of cells in a table.
trans-unit.target: tr 元素表示表中的一行单元格。

trans-unit.source: The track element allows authors to specify explicit external timed text tracks for media elements. It does not represent anything on its own.
trans-unit.target: track 元素允许作者为媒体元素指定明确的外部计时文本轨道。该元素本身不表示任何内容。

trans-unit.source: The u element represents a span of text with an unarticulated, though explicitly rendered, non-textual annotation, such as labeling the text as being a proper name in Chinese text (a Chinese proper name mark), or labeling the text as being misspelt.
trans-unit.target: u 元素表示带有未阐明但明确呈现的非文本批注的一段文本，例如使用中文文本(中文的正确名称标记)将文本标记为正确名称，或将文本标记为拼写有误。

trans-unit.source: The ul element represents a list of items, where the order of the items is not important — that is, where changing the order would not materially change the meaning of the document.
trans-unit.target: ul 元素表示项目列表，其中项目的顺序不重要，即在其中更改顺序其实不会更改文档的含义。

trans-unit.source: The var element represents a variable. This could be an actual variable in a mathematical expression or programming context, an identifier representing a constant, a symbol identifying a physical quantity, a function parameter, or just be a term used as a placeholder in prose.
trans-unit.target: var 元素表示变量。这可以是数学表达式或程序上下文中的实际变量、表示常量的标识符、标识物理数量的符号、函数参数，或只是在文本中用作占位符的词。

trans-unit.source: A video element is used for playing videos or movies, and audio files with captions.
trans-unit.target: video 元素用于播放视频或电影，以及带有字幕的音频文件。

trans-unit.source: The wbr element represents a line break opportunity.
trans-unit.target: wbr 元素表示换行符机会。

trans-unit.source: Displays HTML content in an app.
trans-unit.target: 在应用中显示 HTML 内容。
